rationale: The skill validates Azure deployment readiness by reading the deployment plan and IaC files (Bicep/Terraform/azure.yaml) and updating the plan's validation proof section. It explicitly invokes validation commands like 'azd provision --preview', 'bicep build', and 'terraform validate', which spawn those binaries and reach Azure ARM/AAD endpoints for what-if analysis and RBAC checks. Build verification and reading recipe references are also implied. No deletions are involved since the skill only edits the plan file and runs read-only validation.
